_comment: Retrieval eval set (spec §5). Each item: question, the note id(s) that SHOULD be retrieved, and a 'kind': 'direct' (shares keywords with the target) or 'paraphrase' (reworded to share at most incidental function words with the target — verified low-overlap, see eval/check_overlap.py). Paraphrase items are built to be HARD for keyword search and the real test for embeddings. Several targets have sibling notes on the same project (4 RouteMorph, 3 Geopogo), so a retriever must distinguish among them, not just find the right topic. Run run_eval.py at both stages and compare overall and by kind.
